lib Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual lib Directory Reference(3)

NAME

lib Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory audio
directory crypto
directory debug
directory discovery
directory log
directory media
directory network
directory options
directory platform
directory terminal

Files


file app_callbacks.c
Application callback registration system. file asciichat_errno.c
🚨 Custom error code system with formatted messages, thread-local storage, and errno mapping file atomic.c
Implementation of atomic operations abstraction. file buffer_pool.c
💾 Lock-free memory pool with atomic operations file common.c
🔧 Core utilities: memory management, safe macros, and cross-platform helpers file lifecycle.c
Lock-free module lifecycle state machine implementation. file musl_c23_compat.c
🔄 musl C23 compatibility wrappers for __isoc23_* symbol aliases (glibc 2.38+ compatibility) file ringbuffer.c
🎯 Lock-free circular buffer for audio streaming with atomic operations file thread_pool.c
🧵 Generic thread pool implementation for managing worker threads file version.c
🏷️ Binary-embedded version information in custom ELF/Mach-O sections for runtime inspection

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
